title: Using AI to outsmart drug-resistant bacteria
summary: Google DeepMind highlights research by Ben Luisi's team at Cambridge using AlphaFold and Gemini to accelerate structural biology research on antimicrobial resistance. The work compresses years of analysis into minutes to identify bacterial defense mechanisms against antibiotics.
